content.text:
The issue is that `fadeFast` is typed as `{ type: "tween"; duration: number; ease: number[]; }` and framer-motion expects the `ease` to be typed differently. The `as const` assertion on `type` isn't extending to the `ease` array. I need to explicitly type it as a tuple or use a different approach.

Let me fix by using the `as` keyword to cast the ease array as a proper type, or simply use `Transition` type from framer-motion.
Quick TS fix — need to type the ease array properly:

input.searchTerm: const fadeFast = { type: "tween" as const, duration: 0.2, ease: [0.25, 0.1, 0.25, 1] };
input.replacementText: const fadeFast: Transition = { type: "tween", duration: 0.2, ease: [0.25, 0.1, 0.25, 1] };

content.text: Also fix the `springFast` similarly.

Now also fix `fadeInUp` in AnimatedSection.tsx which has similar issues - the children in this file have hardcoded `ease` arrays too. But those are within `childVariants` which uses object literal syntax that framer-motion should handle fine in the context of `Variants`.

Actually, looking at the error again, the issue is specifically with using a separately defined `Transition` object as a variant's transition. The `fadeIn`, `fadeInUp`, `fadeInDown` use `transition: fadeFast` where `fadeFast` is a `Transition` object with a `number[]` ease array. Framar-motion expects it to be `Easing` type which is `[number, number, number, number]` tuple, not `number[]`.

Let me try a different approach - use a tuple type assertion.

input.searchTerm: const fadeFast: Transition = { type: "tween", duration: 0.2, ease: [0.25, 0.1, 0.25, 1] };
input.replacementText: const fadeFast: Transition = { type: "tween" as const, duration: 0.2, ease: [0.25, 0.1, 0.25, 1] as [number, number, number, number] };

Privacy Policy

Last updated: May 2026

📄 Introduction

Technodel ("we," "our," or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website or make a purchase.

📋 Information We Collect

We may collect the following information:

  • Personal data: Name, email address, phone number, shipping address
  • Order data: Purchase history, product preferences, payment details
  • Technical data: IP address, browser type, device information, cookies
  • Communication data: WhatsApp chats, emails, and support inquiries

🔒 How We Use Your Data

  • Process and fulfill your orders
  • Communicate order updates and delivery information
  • Provide customer support and warranty service
  • Send promotional offers (only with your consent)
  • Improve our website and shopping experience
  • Prevent fraud and ensure transaction security

🤝 Data Sharing

We do not sell your personal information. We may share data with:

  • Delivery partners — to ship your orders
  • Payment processors — to handle transactions securely
  • Legal authorities — if required by law

🍪 Cookies

We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience, remember your preferences, and analyze site traffic. You can control cookie settings in your browser. Essential cookies are required for the shopping cart and account features.

🔐 Data Security

We implement industry-standard security measures including SSL encryption, secure payment gateways, and restricted data access to protect your information.

📧 Your Rights

  • Access the personal data we hold about you
  • Request correction of inaccurate data
  • Request deletion of your data
  • Opt out of marketing communications at any time
  • Withdraw consent where processing is based on consent

📞 Contact

For privacy-related inquiries, contact us at privacy@technodel.net or via WhatsApp.
